case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LINWOOD, ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINWOOD, ANTHONY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.
